name: Colin Quinn
bio: Colin Quinn is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer who anchored Weekend Update on Saturday Night Live from 1998 to 2000 and hosted Comedy Centrals debate panel show Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn. A Brooklyn-bred comic widely called a comedians comedian, he is known for a string of historically-minded one-man shows, including Long Story Short, directed by Jerry Seinfeld. His material favors ethnic identity, history, and the American character.

timeline.ev: Joins Saturday Night Live as cast member
Becomes Weekend Update anchor on SNL
Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn premieres on Comedy Central
Long Story Short opens on Broadway, directed by Jerry Seinfeld
Netflix special The New York Story released

accolades: Host of Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn
Acclaimed solo shows Long Story Short and Red State Blue State
